## prompt-3-mermaid-selection

*Generated by Process A from `auto-bill-01/sub-prompts/prompt-3-mermaid-selection.md`,
widened to Mermaid AND ASCII selection for the single-prompt v5.0 build.*

Produce the curated visual set for H. R. 9510 v5.0 in two halves, because Bill
v5.0 restores the ASCII medium alongside gray-scale Mermaid and tables.

**Half one - the gray-scale Mermaid set.** From the Mermaid diagram families in
`Clinical-AI-Demos/tree/main/ai-outputs/output-01` (the original workflow
flowchart, the PlantUML-inspired component and sequence diagrams, the
D2-inspired declarative map, the Graphviz/DOT clustered flow, the
Structurizr/C4 architecture view, the BPMN workflow, the draw.io swimlane
layout, and the hybrid diagram), produce gray-scale Mermaid diagrams (the
`neutral` theme with explicit gray `classDef` fills `#f5f5f5`, `#e0e0e0`,
`#cfcfcf`, `#bdbdbd`, `#9e9e9e`, black strokes, black text). Re-theme every
diagram to the bill's financial-data subject: the evidence-to-law-to-cost
lineage, the gate decision rule with its cost-record checkpoint, the annual
financial-data reporting sequence from sponsor to Secretary to Congress, the
unit-economics of a ten-gate verification run, the financial-data system of
record, and the nine-milestone build process. Use different and most relevant
diagram types throughout so no two bill figures repeat the same Mermaid
pattern unnecessarily, and state that each Markdown diagram is reproduced in
the compiled LaTeX bill as a matching gray-scale TikZ figure.

**Half two - the ASCII set.** From the verbatim ASCII catalog in
`cancer-automated/tree/main/papers/VVUQ-05/update-bill/figures-bill` and the
rendered ASCII figures of the Bill v3.0 measure
(`cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill/sections`), select and re-theme the
monospace forms that fixed-width financial content needs: the cover process
overview, the side-by-side cost ledger (conventional path beside the
autonomous path, in dollars), the statutory layering map extended to the
financial sections, the comparative-print section order, the
appropriations-to-activities money flow, and the budget-authority-to-outlays
waterfall. Each ASCII figure is set in the centered, white-background,
black-ruled monospace frame (`asciifig`) so it renders as it would in a fenced
GitHub Markdown block.

For every diagram in both halves, give the source (Mermaid or ASCII), the bill
figure slot it serves, and a one-line note on why that medium is correct for
that content, so Stage 4 can finalize placement. Tables are reserved for
enumerable financial data and are planned in Stage 4.

Output `auto-bill-02/03-mermaid-selection/output-3-mermaid-selection.md` plus a
directory `README.md` naming the upstream files used. Commit each file
separately and push in real time within stage milestone M4 of the single pull
request. Do not stall, ask questions, or go into plan mode.
